# Ayman Elmasry — Visionary Architect · AI Orchestrator · Brand Designer

> Founder of AEL Digital Studio. I define the vision and orchestrate AI to build it. Portfolio at ayman-elmasry.vercel.app. Based in UAE/Kuwait.

Ayman Elmasry is a Visionary Architect, AI Orchestrator, and Brand Designer with expertise in Web Development (Full-Stack), Artificial Intelligence & Prompt Engineering, Brand Architecture & UI/UX Design, Digital Marketing & Strategy, and AI Orchestration & Automation. Phone: +971 50 603 9162 / +965 55 125 151. Email: ayman@aymanelmasry.com.

Certifications: IBM SkillsBuild Artificial Intelligence Fundamentals (Jun 2025), AAST Mini Certificate in Digital Arts & Web Design (Mar 2024), Smouha Academy Computer Systems Engineering (2016).
